title: When Does A Cabbage Become A Meteor
description: A mod that adds cabbage meteors based off of EPIC
body:
This mod adds four things which are the cabbage, burnt cabbage, and cabbage meteor. Oh and a special suprise mob to go with it.


You get cabbage from this new mob called the Cabbage Pig and trading with a villager for around five emeralds. You get a burnt cabbage by furnacing it and you get the meteor by crafting together a fire charge and a burnt cabbage. Simple enough?


Inspired by the When does a cabbage become a meteor meme from EPIC the Musical
